body:
Hey team —

Got two deal transfers sitting on my desk that need a capacity check from TW's CA book before we can move forward. Looks like ops needs to confirm available delivery capacity on both before the 25th commercial review cycle.

Can someone pull a snapshot for me? I know things have been moving fast lately, so just want to make sure we don't miss the window here.

Thanks —
Sandra

Got it, Sandra. I can pull the CA delivery capacity snapshots for both transfers.

To make sure I'm looking at the right numbers, can you send over the deal IDs and any specific parameters I should be checking against (delivery points, volumes, dates)? Once I have those, I'll get the available capacity figures over to you ahead of the 25th cutoff.

Let me know —

Deal IDs are TX-1101-042 and TX-1101-057. Both are Nov 1 - Dec 31 baseload, 10,000 MMBtu/day each, delivery at Topock and Ehrenberg respectively. Let me know if you need anything else — and no rush on the fancy formatting, just need the raw numbers when you can get them.

Thanks, Michelle —

Sandra

Got it, Sandra. Both deals confirmed as Nov 1 - Dec 31 baseload at 10,000 MMBtu/d.

TX-1101-042 (Topock): Available capacity currently sits at 10,500 MMBtu/d. Deal clears.

TX-1101-057 (Ehrenberg): Available capacity currently sits at 10,200 MMBtu/d. Deal clears.

Both transfers are within operational limits — ready for the 25th commercial review. Let me know if anything changes on your end before then.

Got it, Michelle — appreciate the quick turnaround. Both deals are a go on the ops side, so I'll get them queued up for the 25th review cycle.

Thanks again —

Sandra
Thanks, Sandra. Standing by if anything comes up before the 25th.
